purpose: Core 12 technical indicators selected from initial ML evaluation for future RS/D1S/D1A strategy research and production scanners. Production scanners should compute only selected indicators/parameters from approved configs, not retrain ML.
selectionCriteria: Sufficient OOS signal count where possible
Feature importance appearance in tree models

core12.name: Support/Resistance Cluster
core12.why: Most important family for RS and D1A in initial ML; captures near support/resistance, touch count, zone strength.

core12.name: Moving Average Structure
core12.why: Trend/context family appearing strongly across RS, D1A and retail/real-estate tasks.

core12.name: ADX / DMI
core12.why: Trend strength and directional pressure; repeatedly important with MA/SR context.

core12.name: MACD Histogram/Slope
core12.why: Momentum/trend transition signal with strong appearance in RS/D1A top features.

core12.name: Supertrend
core12.why: Trend structure and stop/flip context; useful with S/R and MA.

core12.name: TRIX
core12.why: Smooth momentum/base survival feature; important in BDS D1A and overall D1A.

core12.name: Ichimoku Cloud Position
core12.why: Structural trend/cloud context; appears in RS and retail/real estate.

core12.name: VWAP / VWMA
core12.why: Volume-weighted price context, especially for Bank D1A and trend quality.

core12.name: ATR / Volatility
core12.why: Replaces PVI/NVI after full-room foreign-flow distortion review. Rank #13 in SHAKEOUT_RECLAIM selected-indicator list; captures volatility contraction/flush risk and stop-distance context without relying on foreign room data.

core12.name: ROC / Momentum
core12.why: Momentum weakening/rebound family; strong in D1S securities and BDS RS.

core12.name: RSI
core12.why: Classic oscillator; important in D1S securities momentum weakness and parameter search.

core12.name: MFI / CMF
core12.why: Volume-pressure/flow family; group-level volume was important for D1S, especially securities.

replacementNote: PVI_NVI removed from Core12 per user instruction because PVI/NVI/foreign-flow proxies can be misleading for full-room stocks such as MWG. Replacement is ATR_VOLATILITY, the rank #13 indicator in SHAKEOUT_RECLAIM scope from support_buy_step1_select12_indicators_from40_no_lookahead.json/csv.
